title: Asukas new role
wikitext:
[]: Asuka's new role.             Quote Post by darthikari » Mon Feb 23, 2009 10:56 am I was just admiring the new 2.0 pic of Asuka, and couldn't help noticing just how angry she looks. Then something just clicked in my sleep-deprived brain...Seele is German, EVA 02 has devil horns, Asuka looks like she wants to kick the world's ass... What if she's on Seele's side this time? I mean in the original show they sent Kaworu to infiltrate and sabotage NERV, why not change it that Asuka comes to Tokyo 3 to intentionally mess with Shinji? If the story progresses with Asuka X Shinji elements it would add further reason for her frustration and bitchiness. After all, she's been sent on a mission to distract this pathetic boy, and ends up falling for him. They wouldn't even have to spell it out in 2.0, just maybe add a "monolith conference" at the end, just like they did at the end of 1.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Feb 23, 2009 12:14 pm There's something unusual about Asuka looking pissed off?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Feb 23, 2009 12:25 pm If they really want to shake Asuka up they should make her a boy in disguise. It happens in anime enough. I know there's this whole Fem-Kaworu thing. What would that be called? Man-Asuka?

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Mon Feb 23, 2009 12:35 pm Don't we already know that Kaworu is working for Seele this time round from the epilogue in 1.0? Why bother with more? Plus I can't see Asuka working for the bad guys, she does what she does for admiration and praise. And no one praises the villain. Also: Male Asuka would be Mansuka surely?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Feb 23, 2009 12:44 pm master_lloyd wrote: Don't we already know that Kaworu is working for Seele this time round from the epilogue in 1.0? Why bother with more?

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Mon Feb 23, 2009 12:46 pm Yes but Kaji works for everyone. Why bother recruiting another pilot?

[]: Re: Asuka's new role.             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Feb 23, 2009 1:31 pm darthikari wrote: ...Seele is German...

[]: Re: Asuka's new role.             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Feb 23, 2009 1:48 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: while Keel Lorenz is presumed to be German

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Mon Feb 23, 2009 1:50 pm master_lloyd wrote: Yes but Kaji works for everyone. Why bother recruiting another pilot?

[]: Re: Asuka's new role.             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Feb 23, 2009 2:54 pm darthikari wrote: What if she's on Seele's side this time? ... If the story progresses with Asuka X Shinji elements it would add further reason for her frustration and bitchiness. After all, she's been sent on a mission to distract this pathetic boy, and ends up

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Mon Feb 23, 2009 8:06 pm No0o0o0o0o.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Feb 23, 2009 9:43 pm Asuka is just Kaworu in drag this time out.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Feb 23, 2009 11:33 pm I don't think Asuka's expression in the poster is a good thing to base plot changes off of. How many OOC expressions are there in Evangelion's illustrations? Why, I remember way back when, when I was first hunting for Evangelion on VHS, I remember seeing the box art, and not only did I think the character (Shinji) was dramatic and self assure, but I also thought the character was a girl .

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Feb 23, 2009 11:37 pm err, wrong image?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Feb 23, 2009 11:55 pm Ornette wrote: err, wrong image?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Feb 24, 2009 12:31 am Really long red vertical bar is really long, red, and vertical. Hotlinking to evamonkey.com is apparently bad.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Feb 24, 2009 1:15 am Reichu wrote: Really long red vertical bar is really long, red, and vertical. Hotlinking to evamonkey.com is apparently bad.

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Tue Feb 24, 2009 1:29 am coolest image post yet.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Tue Feb 24, 2009 5:36 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Ornette wrote: err, wrong image?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Feb 24, 2009 6:51 am I don't think Asuka's role will change or at least not that much. But it would be interesting to see.
